debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
x₀ σ₂ c : ℝ
N K : ℕ
hlog : log x₀ > 1000
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioo 0.9 1
hc : c ∈ Set.Icc 2 30
hN : N ≥ 1
hK : K ≥ 1
⊢ ∀ x ≥ x₀, Eψ x ≤ FKS.ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K

failed_attempts:
intro x hx
  simp [ε, ε₁, ε₂, ε₃, ε₄]

intro x hx
  have : Eψ x ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
    exact le_of_lt (by
      have : ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K = ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := rfl
      simpa [this] using (lt_add_of_pos_right (Eψ x) (show 0 < 1 from zero_lt_one)))
  exact this

intro x hx
  exact le_of_eq (by simp [ε])

intro x hx
  simpa using (le_of_lt (lt_add_of_pos_right _ (by
    have : (0:ℝ) < ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
      -- ε is a sum of nonnegative terms in the intended application; use a trivial positivity fallback
      have : (0:ℝ) ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
        exact le_of_lt (by
          have : (ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K) + 1 > 0 := by linarith
          linarith)
      linarith
    exact this)))

intro x hx
  simpa using le_of_eq (by
    have : Eψ x = Eψ x := rfl
    simpa using this)

intro x hx
  have hx' : x ≥ x₀ := hx
  exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_rfl) (by
    have : (ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K) < (ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K) + 1 := by linarith
    simpa using this))

intro x hx
  exact le_of_lt (by
    simpa using (lt_add_of_pos_right (Eψ x) (by
      have : (0 : ℝ) < ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
        -- positivity follows from definition as a sum of nonnegative terms; use `lt_of_le_of_ne` fallback
        have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
          simp [ε, ε₁, ε₂, ε₃, ε₄]
        exact lt_of_le_of_ne this (by
          intro h
          have : log x₀ ≤ 1000 := by
            have : (log x₀) = 1000 := by
              -- derive contradiction from `hlog` if needed; this branch is unreachable
              linarith
            linarith
          linarith [hlog]
      simpa [this] )))

intro x hx
  exact le_of_lt (by
    have : Eψ x < ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by

      exact lt_of_le_of_ne this (by
        intro hEq
        exact (lt_irrefl _ (by simpa [hEq] using this)))
    exact this)

  have : Eψ x ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
    have : Eψ x ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by
      exact le_rfl
    exact this
  exact this

    have hx0pos : x₀ > 0 := by
      have : x₀ ≠ 0 := by

      exact lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne' (by

intro x hx
  have hx50 : x > exp 50 := by
    have hx0 : x₀ > exp 1000 := by
      have hx0' : x₀ > 0 := by
        have : log x₀ > log 0 := by simpa using hlog
        exact (log_pos_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using this) (le_of_lt this))).ne'
      have hx0log : x₀ = exp (log x₀) := by
        simpa [Real.exp_log (lt_of_lt_of_le (by
          have : (0:ℝ) < exp 1000 := by exact exp_pos 1000
          exact this) (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by
            have : (0:ℝ) < x₀ := by
              have : log x₀ > log 0 := by simpa using hlog
              exact log_pos_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using this) (le_of_lt this))
            exact this) (le_of_lt (by
              have : exp 1000 > 0 := exp_pos 1000
              exact this))))
          )]
      have : log x₀ > 1000 := hlog
      have : exp (log x₀) > exp 1000 := exp_lt_exp.mpr this
      simpa [hx0log] using this
    have hx' : x > exp 1000 := lt_of_lt_of_le hx0 hx
    have : exp 1000 > exp 50 := by
      have : (1000:ℝ) > 50 := by linarith
      exact exp_lt_exp.mpr this
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt hx')
  have hxpos : x > 0 := lt_trans (exp_pos 50) hx50
  have hxlog : log x ≥ log x₀ := log_le_log (le_of_lt (lt_trans (exp_pos 50) hx50)) (by exact hx)
  have hT : (max (51:ℝ) (log x)) < (max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R 0.9) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c := by
    have : (51:ℝ) < (max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R 0.9) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c := by
      have ht0pos : 0 < max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R 0.9) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R)) := by
        have : 0 < exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R) := exp_pos _
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_max_right _ _)
      have hc' : (1:ℝ) ≤ c := (hc.1.trans (by norm_num))
      have : (51:ℝ) < (max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R 0.9) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) := lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (le_max_right _ _)
      have : (51:ℝ) < (max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R 0.9) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c := by
        have := pow_lt_pow_of_lt_left (le_of_lt ht0pos) this (by
          have : (1:ℝ) ≤ c := hc'
          exact this)
        simpa using this
      exact this
    have : log x < (max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R 0.9) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c := by
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt hxlog (lt_trans (by linarith) this)
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_max_of_lt_left this) (le_of_lt this)
  have : ∃ M xM : ℝ, ∀ x, ∀ T ∈ Set.Ioo (max 51 (log x)) ((x^(1/2) - 2) / 5), ∃ Tstar ∈ Set.Icc T (2.45 * T), ∀ x ≥ xM,
      ‖ψ x - (x - riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-Tstar) Tstar) (fun ρ ↦ x^ρ / ρ))‖ ≤ M * x / T * (log x)^(1 - 1) :=
    theorem_3_2 (α := (1/2:ℝ)) (ω := 1) (by constructor <;> linarith) (by constructor <;> linarith)
  rcases this with ⟨M, xM, h⟩
  have hxM : x ≥ xM := le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by have := exp_pos 50; exact this) (le_of_lt hxpos))

intro x hx
  have hx' : x > exp 50 := by
    have hx0 : x₀ > exp 1000 := by
      have : x₀ = exp (log x₀) := by
        symm
        exact (exp_log (by
          have : log x₀ ≠ 0 := by linarith
          exact exp_ne_zero (log x₀) ▸ by
            -- exp_ne_zero gives exp(log x₀) ≠ 0; but we need x₀ ≠ 0 for exp_log? actually exp_log needs x₀ > 0
            sorry)).symm
      have hx0pos : x₀ > 0 := by
        have : log x₀ > 1000 := hlog
        have : x₀ > 0 := by
          have : exp (log x₀) > 0 := exp_pos (log x₀)
          simpa [exp_log (by
            have : x₀ ≠ 0 := by
              intro hxz
              simp [hxz] at hlog
            exact lt_of_le_of_ne' (le_of_lt (by
              have := exp_pos (log x₀)
              simpa [exp_log (by
                -- same issue
                sorry)]) (Ne.symm (by
                  -- dummy
                  sorry)))] using this
        exact this
      have : x₀ = exp (log x₀) := by
        symm
        exact exp_log (by
          have : x₀ > 0 := by
            have := lt_trans (by linarith) (exp_pos (log x₀))
            -- cannot
            sorry
          exact this)
      have : x₀ > exp 1000 := by
        -- from log x₀ > 1000, exp monotone
        have := (exp_lt_exp).2 hlog
        simpa [this] using this
      exact this
    have hx0exp50 : x₀ > exp 50 := lt_trans (by
      have : (50:ℝ) < 1000 := by linarith
      exact (exp_lt_exp).2 this) hx0
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le hx0exp50 (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hx0exp50 (le_trans (le_of_lt hx) le_rfl)))
  -- use trivial bound from theorem_3_1/proposition_3_4 chain; final theorem statement is encapsulated in ε definition

  simpa [ε] using (le_of_eq (by rfl))

      exact lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt (by

    have hx₀_gt1 : x₀ > 1 := by

      exact (log_pos_iff hx₀_pos).1 this
    have hx₀_gt_exp50 : x₀ > exp 50 := by

    have : (3 * log x) < (sqrt x / 3) := by

  have hprop := proposition_3_4 (x := x) (T := (max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c) hx0 hT
  have : ε₁ x ((max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c) ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by

            ((max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x₀) / I.R))) ^ c))
          (fun ρ => ‖x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) := by
    exact riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_nonneg (by intro ρ; simp)
  have : Eψ x ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by

  exact this
